title: USB C to Lightning Cable 2Pack 1M +2M MFi Certified, Fast Charging USB C iPhone Charger Cable Lead for Apple iPhone 14 13 12 11 Pro Max X XR XS 8 Plus, for iPad- Type C to Lightning Cable
features: Compatibility List : The usb c to lightning cables support power delivery fast charge for iPhone 14/14 Pro/14 Pro Max/14 Plus/13/13 Pro/13 Pro Max/13 mini/12/12 Pro/12 Pro Max/12 mini/11/11 Pro/11 Pro Max/SE/X/XS/XS Max/XR/8/8 Plus Etc. for iPad, for iPad mini 4 / 3 / 2, for iPad mini, for iPad Air 2, for iPad Air.

Premium Durability : High quality thermoplastic elastic TPE and PVC material can avoid tangling the wire, tested to withstand over 30,000 bends. Its durable design ensures it outlasts standard cables, while the tangle-free feature makes it easy to use and store.

Fast Charge & Sync : The USB C to Lightning cables support fast charging when using USB-C Power Delivery Chargers (including 20W, 29W, 30W, 61W USB-C Power Adapters) Which Charges Phone from 0% to 50% in 30 minutes, It also offers high-speed data transfer at 480Mbps, making it easy to sync photos, music, and files between your Phone and computer in seconds.

BSTOEM Charger Cable : Built with original terminal and smart chip Built-in overvoltage protection, battery protector and automatic chip recognition functions protect your for iPhone/for iPad well from damages. it adopts new reinforced joint technology for extra protection and durability.
What You Can Get : 2Pack 1M+2M USB C to Lightning Cable, 6-months warranty, Our service team will provide you with satisfactory solutions within 24 hours to demonstrate our importance to quality.
description: Product Description BSTOEM USB C to for Lightning Cable Compatible with Devices: Power Delivery Fast Charging： Compatible for iPhone 14Pro Max/14Pro/14 Plus/14 Compatible for iPhone 13Pro Max/13Pro/mini/13/12Pro Max/12Pro/mini/12 Compatible for iPhone 11Pro Max/11Pro/11/XS/XS Max/XR/X/8Plus/8 Compatible for iPad 8th/2020/for iPro 12.9" gen1/ Pro 12.9" gen2/Pro 10.5"/Air3 10.5"/ mini5 7.9 Standard Charging： Compatible for iPhone 7 Plus/7/6 Plus/6/6S Plus/6S/5S/5C/5 Compatible for iPad Mini 4/3/2, for iPad Air 2, for iPad 6/5 etc USB-C Connector : Compatible for MacBook 12" 2015 / 2016 / for MacBook Pro 13" 15" 2017/2018, New for MacBook Air Compatible for iMac 21.5", for iMac 27", for iMac Pro (Note:You need to use 20W or above USB-C Power Adapter to achieve Power Delivery Fast Charging.If you use less than 20W adapter, these usb c to lightning cables only support standard charge.)
